# Gist - Chrome Extension Deployment Package

This folder contains the production-ready Chrome extension.

## Installation

1. Open Chrome and navigate to `chrome://extensions/`
2. Enable "Developer mode" (toggle in top right)
3. Click "Load unpacked"
4. Select this `dist` folder

## Contents

- `manifest.json` - Extension configuration
- `content/` - Content scripts for Google Search pages
- `popup/` - Extension popup UI
- `icons/` - Extension icons
- `lib/` - Third-party libraries (showdown.min.js)

## Version

1.0.0
